data.body: Investigation: Gate 2a fallback JSON in fix-bug/SKILL.md (line 644) already uses properly quoted keys. The gate-2a-reversal-check.sh script also uses proper Python JSON serialization. All 7 gate 2a tests pass. Bug was resolved in commit 2bfd65f9 (feat: integrate gates 1a, 2a, 2b into fix-bug SKILL.md).
